title: Just Right.
description: Enhance Minecraft with 100+ mods and the perfect configs without having it feel like a different game. Enjoy smooth gameplay with performance mods and shader support. Discover stunning landscapes, adventurous dungeons, and improved QoL features.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95453405ffdb6444a84f66414d6b5c32b463cb2f.png)
**'Just Right' - A Perfectly Balanced Minecraft Overhaul**

Dive into a Minecraft experience that feels just right! With over 100 mods and counting plus the perfect configs for them. Just Right enhances your game, adding adventure and excitement with the countless mods featured in this modpack, minecraft will seem much more immersive and enjoyable.

**🥇 Enhanced Performance**

Smooth and optimized gameplay thanks to modern performance mods like Embeddium, Saturn, Canary and more without sacrificing visuals, being fully optimized and has shader support

**🗺️ World Generation**

Discover breathtaking landscapes, with mods like Terralith, Biomes O' Plenty and Amplified Nether!
![A landscape showcasing world generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0077948fcb8e19e2b20f4859994fa43501a18cf1.png)

**⚔️ Adventure**

Dive into dungeons, temples, and other structures! With mods like Dungeon Crawl allowing you to fight for loot in roguelike dungeons with multiple levels, or even Structory, adding atmospheric structures!

![A dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2a63a3a68b335c278b16f03f9b7027f212c229.png)

**💡 QoL Improvements**

Enjoy a more satisfying experience with countless mods like Blur, Mouse Tweaks, Areas, Traveler's Titles and much more! With mods like Legendary Tooltips your more rare items would feel much more special, as well as Advancement Plaques making it much more exciting to get an advancement!

*changing gui scale may break some visuals as I have set the configs while on the current gui scale

![Damage from a creeper explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78d49c5888d4fc371fadd35b5b2a0ff59bf81ff.png)
![The nether, with biome text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d268426a35ae1a22defe827ca7b2b54e5c3d4ef5.png)

**🏞️ Included Shaders**
 With Complimentary Reimagined, enjoy beautiful scenery, with tons of high quality effects and wonderful optimization. Allowing you to choose between 2 styles! (unbound, reimagined) one being a more vanilla like look and the other a more realistic look! Paired the Euphoria Patches you can get even more out of Complimentary!

 *If you have performance issues with the shaders, you can choose from presets in shader settings instead of mine or just dont use them. Another note, beams that shoot up from dropped items dont really work well with shaders and dissapear when turning shaders on
 ![A beautiful arch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60f31f6fa87f20d9750dfdc91fc12f27366dcf7.png)
 
###  If you run into any issues or have suggestions or questions message me on discord at:
###  njfsmiley

![The modpacks full logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7928f6a589d7271832e6b220ad349068ec2ca468.png)

⚠️By default the modpack is set at 8GB of ram. I recommend at minimum 6GB of available ram or 8GB if possible. If you dont have 8GB available you can lower the ammount.

Aquaculture 2: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

More Villagers: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)

Dynamic Trees - Terralith: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-terralith)

Quark Programmer Art: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)

Amplified Nether: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/amplified-nether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/amplified-nether)
